Consistency is the key.

Installing Fritzing easily on Ubuntu

by Jonathan Plasse on September 28, 2019

This is an easy method to install Fritzing on Ubuntu using packages.

  1. Run in a terminal sudo apt install fritzing fritzing-parts

You can now open Fritzing.

Share Twitter Facebook Google+
Tags: fritzinglinuxinstall
